_help: Three jobs co-located on one server, sharing its embodied carbon. Edit each job's `peak` (the peak demand it drives — what the hardware is sized/built for) and `resource_time` (CPU x runtime — what RUP bills by). Re-run: ./tutorial.sh --workloads exercises/workloads.json . The shared budget defaults to ACT's R740 embodied carbon from segment 1 (1523.1 kg); override with --budget <kg>.
